## Meeting Purpose

[Dive deeper into Okta's workflows and identify high-impact areas for optimization, focusing on retail industry initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating foundational AI-ready artifacts for Auth0, starting with retail industry](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Prioritize building company-specific and industry-specific artifacts to enhance personalization](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Develop a "signal engine" to surface key insights for demand gen and marketing teams](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Website optimization identified as a critical area for improvement](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)

## Topics

### Auth0 Strategic Focus

  - [Current winning industries: retail, healthcare, health tech, FinServ/FinTech, insurance, hospitality, media/entertainment](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=833.0)
  - [Revenue model focus: Companies with external application logins are prime targets](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=872.0)
  - [Upcoming programs: Retail, FinServ, healthcare, and B2B SaaS in the next quarter](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Geographic focus: UKI and United States for initial retail initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1223.0)

### Artifact Creation Strategy

  - [Develop foundational artifacts for Auth0: product-specific, industry-specific, use case-specific](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Create company-specific artifacts: detailed research beyond basic enrichment data](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=342.0)
  - [Persona-level artifacts to follow company-level research](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Goal: Build a shareable library of AI-ready artifacts for internal use](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=448.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Create a company researcher and context generator workflow](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Generate personalized touches for events (pre/post) and webinars](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Focus on teaching teams to leverage artifacts effectively, not just automating outreach](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=479.0)

### Center of Excellence Vision

  - [Build a "signal engine" to classify and surface key market signals](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Integrate with Sixth Sense data for enhanced insights](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Develop a "growth lab" for rapid testing and refinement of messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Website Improvement

  - [Identified as a critical area for investment and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Need for updated customer references and fresher content](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)
  - [Potential partnership with Shopify opening new opportunities in retail](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1730.0)

### Team Development

  - [Emphasis on upskilling marketers to be more AI-native](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)
  - [Potential for "GrowthX Lab School" concept to train teams](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1065.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Rachel to provide:](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
      - [List of retail prospect accounts for UKI and USA](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
      - [List of referenceable customers for UKI and USA](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
      - [Simple contact personas](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
      - [Customer case studies for retail](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Program brief for context](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [Connect with PMM for retail vertical](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1874.0)
  - [Share internal win-loss analysis](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
  - [Begin creating foundational artifacts for Auth0, starting with retail focus](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=128.0)
  - [Explore potential for direct customer access for deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=1694.0)
  - [Connect with Alexa Martin for SDR team context on Auth0](https://fathom.video/share/Mg7-QMmn9fxNAG9-exs-ZX7cUxXbSWQm?tab=summary&timestamp=2011.0)
